2604.09025.title: Skill-Conditioned Visual Geolocation for Vision-Language
2604.09025.paper_summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown a promising ability in image geolocation, but they still lack structured geographic reasoning and the capacity for autonomous self-evolution. Existing methods predominantly rely on implicit parametric memory, which often exploits outdated knowledge and generates hallucinated reasoning. Furthermore, current inference is a "one-off" process, lacking the feedback loops necessary for self-evolution based on reasoning outcomes. To address these issues, we propose GeoSkill, a training-free framework based on an evolving Skill-Graph. We first initialize the graph by refining human expert trajectories into atomic, natural-language skills. For execution, GeoSkill employs an inference model to perform direct reasoning guided by the current Skill-Graph. For continuous growth, an Autonomous Evolution mechanism leverages a larger model to conduct multiple reasoning rollouts on image-coordinate pairs sourced from web-scale data and verified real-world reasoning. By analyzing both successful and failed trajectories from these rollouts, the mechanism iteratively synthesizes and prunes skills, effectively expanding the Skill-Graph and correcting geographic biases without any parameter updates. Experiments demonstrate that GeoSkill achieves promising performance in both geolocation accuracy and reasoning faithfulness on GeoRC, while maintaining superior generalization across diverse external datasets. Furthermore, our autonomous evolution fosters the emergence of novel, verifiable skills, significantly enhancing the system's cognition of real-world geographic knowledge beyond isolated case studies.
2604.09025.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型 (VLMs) 在影像地理定位方面顯示出良好的潛力，但它們仍然缺乏結構化的地理推理能力及自主自我演化的能力。現有的方法主要依賴隱式參數記憶，這通常利用過時的知識並產生幻覺式的推理。此外，目前的推理是一個「一次性」過程，缺乏基於推理結果進行自我演化所需的反饋循環。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了 GeoSkill，一個基於不斷演變的技能圖的無需訓練的框架。我們首先通過將人類專家的軌跡精煉為原子化的自然語言技能來初始化圖。為了執行，GeoSkill 採用推理模型，根據當前的技能圖進行直接推理。為了持續增長，自主演化機制利用更大的模型在來自網絡規模數據和經過驗證的現實世界推理的影像坐標對上進行多次推理展開。通過分析這些展開中的成功和失敗軌跡，該機制迭代地合成和修剪技能，有效地擴展技能圖並在不進行任何參數更新的情況下修正地理偏見。實驗表明，GeoSkill 在 GeoRC 上實現了有希望的地理定位準確性和推理真實性，同時在各種外部數據集上保持了優越的泛化能力。此外，我們的自主演化促進了新穎且可驗證技能的出現，顯著增強了系統對現實世界地理知識的認知，超越了孤立的案例研究。
2604.09025.author: Chenjie Yang et.al.
2604.09025.authors: Chenjie Yang, Yutian Jiang, Chenyu Wu
